category_sources: Official YUI Compressor site describes it as JavaScript and CSS minification/compression tooling.
source_facts.description says Yahoo! JavaScript and CSS compressor.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is YUI Compressor.
source_facts.name is yuicompressor, the executable/package name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is an official documentation fallback.
Official YUI Compressor homepage includes detailed documentation and command-line usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/yui/yuicompressor; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage documents command-line compression/minification options.
source_facts.description identifies JavaScript and CSS compression.
